title: Body of man missing since escaping from a hospital in 2025 found in Newton lake
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Leonard Mercury's body was found in Crystal Lake, Newton, nearly five months after disappearing from Gardner hospital.
Mercury, 57, left Heywood Hospital on October 31, 2025, in mental and medical distress, escaping barefoot.
Gardner police utilized drones to locate Mercury's body; State Police Dive Team retrieved it for identification.

title: A doctor once told her not to run. Now she’s taking on the Boston Marathon.
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Sydney Southern will run the 2026 Boston Marathon over 10 years after surgery for a femur tumor.
A doctor recommended she avoid running, but Southern has been cleared for all physical activities after recovery.
She runs to honor Mass General Hospital, raising funds and awareness for its patients and staff.

title: Cambridge pediatric doctor running fifth Boston Marathon to support Mass General patients
author: Kelly Chan
bullets: Jennifer Leah Goetz, 39, from Cambridge, is running her fifth Boston Marathon to support Massachusetts General Hospital patients.
Goetz trained in pediatrics and psychiatry at MGH, working with children and families fighting cancer during her career.
Running began as a way to combat depression for Goetz and has become a vital part of her life.

title: Brothers unite for Boston Marathon run honoring family, cancer losses
author: Kelly Chan
bullets: Collin and Conor Nally will run the 130th Boston Marathon to honor family members lost to cancer.
Collin's journey into running began after his father's death from cancer in 2023.
The Boston Marathon serves as a tribute to those affected by cancer, motivating the Nally brothers.

title: Mass. has one of the best minor league ballparks in America, according to USA Today readers
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: Polar Park in Worcester ranked No. 6 in USA Today's 10Best Readers’ Choice Awards for minor league ballparks.
Polar Park, home to the Worcester Red Sox, opened in 2021 and has revitalized Worcester, Massachusetts.
Smiley Ball, the Worcester Red Sox mascot, ranked No. 3 among minor league mascots in USA Today's list.

title: 5 best new restaurant openings and dining updates in Boston (March 26, 2026)
author: Katelyn Umholtz
bullets: 7th Street Burger opens on Newbury Street, plans a South Boston location for April.
Far Out Ice Cream will open its fourth location in Brighton by April 19.
Gemma Kitchen & Bar to open in Norwood inside a historic firehouse in late April.

title: State Police Sgt. Scott Quigley indicted in deadly Woburn crash
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: State Police Sgt. Scott Quigley indicted for motor vehicle homicide in 2023 Woburn crash killing Angelo Schettino.
Quigley allegedly drove drunk, crossed into oncoming traffic causing the collision; injured van driver as well.
Massachusetts State Police pledged cooperation with the investigation; Quigley maintains it was a tragic accident.

title: Framingham’s iconic ‘castle’ hotel has entered a new era. Take a look inside.
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: The former Sheraton Framingham Hotel & Conference Center is now The Framingham Hotel Collection, a Marriott Bonvoy tri-brand property.
The 371-room campus includes the Renaissance Framingham, Fairfield Inn & Suites, and TownePlace Suites, catering to diverse traveler needs.
Renovations feature modernized spaces and new dining options such as Malone's Irish Pub, Provisions Hearth & Kitchen, and Tara Cafe.

title: With travel concerns rising, are you rethinking flights?
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Concerns rise over TSA staffing at Logan Airport amid partial Department of Homeland Security shutdown.
Union warns potential delays at Logan Airport as summer travel season approaches due to staffing issues.
Recent deadly crash at LaGuardia Airport adds to air travel safety concerns linked to staffing and technology failures.

title: This Boston hotel is giving music lovers a reason to travel
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: Omni Boston Hotel at the Seaport offers 'All Access Pass' for sold-out concerts, catering to rising concert tourism.
Logan Airport introduces a biometric system allowing TSA PreCheck travelers to pass through security using facial recognition.
Coastal Maine Botanical Garden in Boothbay named among best in America, featuring giant trolls by Thomas Dambo.
